lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. What can you do for me?

lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: A good question indeed! I'm selling special clothing for Agility enthusiasts.

lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: Sometimes, when you're exploring the hidden rooftops of our cities, you'll find one of my Marks.

lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: Once you've got enough Marks, I'll exchange them for my Graceful clothing. So, does that interest you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see what you're selling?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see what you're selling?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see how many laps I've completed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I toggle my lap counter?

lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: Sure, I've disabled your lap counter messages, if you want to turn it back on, so you can see your total laps after you finish one, speak to me again.

lines.speaker: Grace
lines.text: Sure, I've turned on your lap counter, you'll get a message when you complete a lap on a rooftop course. To help you keep track.
